mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.review_type as reviewType, r.content as content, r.company_id as companyId, r.plan_id as planId, r.score as score, r.display_yn as displayYn, r.plan_id as planId, r.create_date as createDate, r.create_id as createId, u.username, u.kakao_user_id, r.company_id, c.name AS companyNm, c.logo_img as planLogoImg FROM tb_csm_semotong_review r LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_user u ON r.create_id = u.id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_company_list c ON r.company_id = c.id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY r.create_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_csm_semotong_review r LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_user u ON r.create_id = u.id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_company_list c ON r.company_id = c.id WHERE 1=1
SELECT id, review_type, content, score, display_yn, manage_id, manage_memo, create_date, create_id, modified_date, modified_id FROM tb_csm_semotong_review WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_csm_semotong_review (review_type, company_id, order_id,plan_id, content, score, display_yn, manage_id, manage_memo, create_id) VALUES( #{reviewType}, #{companyId}, #{orderId}, #{planId}, #{content}, #{score}, #{displayYn}, #{manageId}, #{manageMemo}, #{createId} );
mapper.select: /* userOrderReviewList */ SELECT a.id ,a.order_seq ,a.telecom_cd ,a.open_comp_dttm ,a.company_id ,a.plan_id ,c.plan_name ,c.plan_name_smt ,c.plan_type ,c.sup_data_val ,c.sup_qos ,c.sup_call_val ,c.sup_sms_val ,c.daily_data ,c.normal_price ,c.sale_price ,c.after_price ,c.promotion_period ,c.promotion_period_val ,c.image_badge_special ,c.image_badge_it_comb ,c.image_badge_add_data ,c.image_badge_add_data_nm ,c.image_badge_simple_open ,IFNULL(b.id,-1) AS reviewId ,b.review_type ,b.content ,b.score ,d.logo_img as planLogoImg ,d.name AS companyNm ,(SELECT CASE WHEN h.amount = h.avail_amount then 'YET' ELSE 'EXX' END FROM tb_mbm_point_history h WHERE h.order_id = a.id AND h.cr_point_type = 'REV' LIMIT 1 ) AS pointHistoryAvailAmount FROM tb_pmb_plan_online_open a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_csm_semotong_review b ON a.id = b.order_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list c ON a.plan_id = c.id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_company_list d ON a.company_id = d.id WHERE entr_user_id = #{userId} AND a.order_state = '06'
